suite.name: Resource-Partner
suite.source: C:\Users\zamic\Documents\INTERN\Robot Framework\Robot Framework TMFORCE Mobile\Test Case For Video\Resource-Partner.robot

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` appears on current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` appears on current page.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Tap With Positions
kw.doc: Taps on a particular place with up to five fingers, holding for a certain time

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"]
Element locator 'xpath= //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"]' did not match any elements after 5 seconds
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
kw.status: Element locator 'xpath= //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Yes"]' did not match any elements after 5 seconds

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Keycode
kw.doc: Sends a press of keycode to the device.
